# Standard Structure of a Nautobot 3.x Plugin

Research document based on:

- [cookiecutter-nautobot-app](https://github.com/nautobot/cookiecutter-nautobot-app) (official Network to Code template)
- [NautobotAppConfig Documentation](https://docs.nautobot.com/projects/core/en/stable/development/apps/api/nautobot-app-config/)
- [App Setup Documentation](https://docs.nautobot.com/projects/core/en/stable/development/apps/api/setup/)
- The reference plugin `nautobot_netdb_tracking` (functional and proven in production)

---

## 1. Standard File Structure

### Complete Tree Generated by Cookiecutter

```text
nautobot-app-<app_slug>/                   # Project root directory (git repo)
â”śâ”€â”€ .github/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ CODEOWNERS
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ workflows/
â”‚       â”śâ”€â”€ ci.yml
â”‚       â””â”€â”€ changelog.yml
â”śâ”€â”€ .gitignore
â”śâ”€â”€ .readthedocs.yaml
â”śâ”€â”€ .yamllint.yml
â”śâ”€â”€ changes/                               # Changelog entries (towncrier)
â”śâ”€â”€ development/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ docker-compose.yml
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ nautobot_config.py
â”śâ”€â”€ docs/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ admin/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ dev/
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ user/
â”śâ”€â”€ invoke.example.yml
â”śâ”€â”€ mkdocs.yml
â”śâ”€â”€ pyproject.toml                         # Project configuration (Poetry)
â”śâ”€â”€ README.md
â”śâ”€â”€ tasks.py                               # Invoke tasks
â”‚
â””â”€â”€ <app_name>/                            # Python package (snake_case)
    â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py                        # NautobotAppConfig -- REQUIRED
    â”śâ”€â”€ admin.py                           # Django Admin Interface
    â”śâ”€â”€ api/
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ serializers.py                 # REST API serializers
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ urls.py                        # REST API URL patterns
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ views.py                       # REST API viewsets
    â”śâ”€â”€ banner.py                          # Custom banner (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ custom_validators.py               # Custom validators (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ datasources.py                     # Git datasources (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ filter_extensions.py               # Filter extensions (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ filters.py                         # FilterSets UI/API/GraphQL
    â”śâ”€â”€ forms.py                           # UI Forms and Filter Forms
    â”śâ”€â”€ graphql/
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ types.py                       # GraphQL Type Objects (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ homepage.py                        # Home Page Content (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ jinja_filters.py                   # Jinja2 filters (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ jobs/
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py                    # register_jobs() -- REQUIRED if jobs
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ _base.py                       # Common base class (convention)
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ my_job.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ middleware.py                       # Django middleware (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ migrations/
    â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ 0001_initial.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ models.py                          # Django models
    â”śâ”€â”€ navigation.py                      # Navigation menu items
    â”śâ”€â”€ secrets.py                         # Secret providers (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ signals.py                         # Signal handlers
    â”śâ”€â”€ static/
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ <app_name>/
    â”‚       â”śâ”€â”€ css/
    â”‚       â””â”€â”€ js/
    â”śâ”€â”€ table_extensions.py                # Extending core tables (optional)
    â”śâ”€â”€ template_content.py                # TemplateExtension (tabs, panels)
    â”śâ”€â”€ templates/
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ <app_name>/
    â”‚       â”śâ”€â”€ inc/                       # Partial templates (panels, tabs)
    â”‚       â””â”€â”€ *.html
    â”śâ”€â”€ urls.py                            # UI URL patterns
    â””â”€â”€ views.py                           # UI views
â”‚
â””â”€â”€ tests/
    â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ conftest.py                        # Pytest fixtures
    â”śâ”€â”€ test_settings.py                   # Django settings for tests
    â”śâ”€â”€ test_models.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ test_filters.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ test_views.py
    â”śâ”€â”€ test_api.py
    â””â”€â”€ test_jobs.py
```

### Required vs Optional Files

| File | Status | Reason |
| ---- | ------ | ------ |
| `<app_name>/__init__.py` | **REQUIRED** | Contains NautobotAppConfig |
| `pyproject.toml` | **REQUIRED** | Configuration and dependencies |
| `<app_name>/migrations/__init__.py` | **REQUIRED** | Django requires the package |
| `<app_name>/migrations/0001_initial.py` | **REQUIRED** if models | Created by `makemigrations` |
| `<app_name>/models.py` | Highly recommended | Almost always needed |
| `<app_name>/filters.py` | Highly recommended | UI and API filtering |
| `<app_name>/forms.py` | Highly recommended | UI forms |
| `<app_name>/views.py` | Highly recommended | UI views |
| `<app_name>/urls.py` | Highly recommended | UI URL routing |
| `<app_name>/navigation.py` | Highly recommended | Nautobot menu |
| `<app_name>/api/` | Highly recommended | Standard REST API |
| `<app_name>/tables.py` | Highly recommended | List display |
| `<app_name>/jobs/` | Optional | Only if automation needed |
| `<app_name>/signals.py` | Optional | post_migrate hooks |
| `<app_name>/template_content.py` | Optional | Tabs/panels on core views |
| `<app_name>/static/` | Optional | Custom CSS/JS |
| `<app_name>/templates/` | Optional | Custom HTML |
| `<app_name>/admin.py` | Optional | Django admin |
| `<app_name>/banner.py` | Optional | UI banner |
| `<app_name>/middleware.py` | Optional | Custom Django middleware |
| `<app_name>/jinja_filters.py` | Optional | Custom Jinja2 filters |
| `<app_name>/graphql/` | Optional | Custom GraphQL types |
| `<app_name>/custom_validators.py` | Optional | Validators on core models |
| `<app_name>/datasources.py` | Optional | Git datasources |
| `<app_name>/secrets.py` | Optional | Custom secret providers |
| `<app_name>/homepage.py` | Optional | Home page widgets |
| `tests/` | **REQUIRED** | NTC standard: >=80% coverage |
| `README.md` | **REQUIRED** | Minimal documentation |

### Naming Conventions

| Artifact | Convention | Example |
| -------- | ---------- | ------- |
| Python package (`app_name`) | `snake_case` | `nautobot_route_tracking` |
| Project name (`project_slug`) | `kebab-case` | `nautobot-app-route-tracking` |
| PyPI name (`name` in pyproject) | `kebab-case` | `nautobot-route-tracking` |
| `base_url` in NautobotAppConfig | `kebab-case` | `route-tracking` |
| NautobotAppConfig class | `PascalCase` | `NautobotRouteTrackingConfig` |
| Django models | `PascalCase` | `RouteEntry`, `RouteHistory` |
| django-tables2 tables | `PascalCase` + `Table` | `RouteEntryTable` |
| FilterSets | `PascalCase` + `FilterSet` | `RouteEntryFilterSet` |
| Serializers | `PascalCase` + `Serializer` | `RouteEntrySerializer` |
| API ViewSets | `PascalCase` + `ViewSet` | `RouteEntryViewSet` |
| UI ViewSets | `PascalCase` + `UIViewSet` | `RouteEntryUIViewSet` |

---

## 2. NautobotAppConfig (`__init__.py`)

### Required Attributes

These 6 attributes must be defined in any `NautobotAppConfig` subclass:

| Attribute | Type | Description | Example |
| --------- | ---- | ----------- | ------- |
| `name` | `str` | Python package name (identical to source directory) | `"nautobot_route_tracking"` |
| `verbose_name` | `str` | Human-readable name displayed in the UI | `"Route Tracking"` |
| `version` | `str` | Plugin semver version | `"1.0.0"` |
| `author` | `str` | Author or organization name | `"Thomas"` |
| `author_email` | `str` | Public contact email | `"thomas@networktocode.com"` |
| `description` | `str` | Short plugin description | `"Track IP routes from network devices"` |

### Important Optional Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Default | Description |
| --------- | ---- | ------- | ----------- |
| `base_url` | `str` | Same as `name` | URL prefix for all plugin routes. **Use kebab-case** (e.g. `"route-tracking"`). Different from `name` which is in snake_case. |
| `required_settings` | `list[str]` | `[]` | Settings that **must** be in `PLUGINS_CONFIG[app_name]`. If absent, Nautobot refuses to start. |
| `default_settings` | `dict` | `{}` | Default values for optional settings. Merged with `PLUGINS_CONFIG[app_name]`. |
| `min_version` | `str \| None` | `None` | Minimum required Nautobot version (e.g. `"3.0.6"`). Checked at startup. |
| `max_version` | `str \| None` | `None` | Maximum compatible Nautobot version (e.g. `"3.99"`). |
| `middleware` | `list[str]` | `[]` | Django middleware classes to add after Nautobot core middleware. |
| `installed_apps` | `list[str]` | `[]` | Additional Django apps to activate automatically (e.g. dependencies that are not plugins). |
| `provides_dynamic_jobs` | `bool` | `False` | Enables job code reloading at each execution. |
| `searchable_models` | `list[str]` | `[]` | Models included in Nautobot global search. Format: `["app_label.ModelName"]`. |
| `constance_config` | `dict` | `{}` | Dynamic settings via Django Constance (stored in DB, modifiable without restart). |

### Module Location Attributes

These attributes are **dotted Python paths** to modules containing the corresponding features. Nautobot loads them automatically.

| Attribute | Target Module | Example |
| --------- | ------------- | ------- |
| `banner_function` | Banner function | `"nautobot_route_tracking.banner.banner_message"` |
| `custom_validators` | List of validator classes | `"nautobot_route_tracking.custom_validators"` |
| `jinja_filters` | Jinja2 filters module | `"nautobot_route_tracking.jinja_filters"` |
| `jobs` | Module containing jobs | `"nautobot_route_tracking.jobs"` |
| `menu_items` | `menu_items` variable in navigation.py | Automatically detected via `navigation.py` |
| `template_extensions` | List of TemplateExtension classes | `"nautobot_route_tracking.template_content"` |

**Note**: In practice with Nautobot 3.x, `jobs` is not needed in `NautobotAppConfig` if `register_jobs()` is called in `jobs/__init__.py`.

### `ready()` Method

The `ready()` method is called by Django when the app is fully initialized (after all apps are loaded). This is the right place to:

1. **Import and connect Django signals** -- must be done here because models are available
2. **Fix job grouping** -- Nautobot resets grouping at each startup
3. **Register callbacks** -- hooks on other apps
4. **Never** import models at the plugin module level (risk of circular imports)

```python
def ready(self) -> None:
    """Hook called when Django is fully initialized."""
    super().ready()  # ALWAYS call super().ready() first

    # Import signals (MUST be in ready(), not at module level)
    from nautobot_route_tracking.signals import register_signals
    register_signals(sender=self.__class__)

    # Fix job grouping (Nautobot resets it at startup)
    self._fix_job_grouping()

@staticmethod
def _fix_job_grouping() -> None:
    """Fix job grouping after each startup."""
    from django.db import OperationalError, ProgrammingError
    try:
        from nautobot.extras.models import Job
        Job.objects.filter(
            module_name__startswith="nautobot_route_tracking.jobs"
        ).update(grouping="Route Tracking")
    except (OperationalError, ProgrammingError):
        # Tables do not exist during initial migration
        pass
```

**Critical pitfall**: Always wrap ORM access in `ready()` with a try/except `(OperationalError, ProgrammingError)`. Tables may not exist yet during the first migration.

### `register_jobs()` Pattern in `jobs/__init__.py`

In Nautobot 3.x, jobs are **not auto-registered**. You must explicitly call `register_jobs()` from `nautobot.core.celery`:

```python
# nautobot_route_tracking/jobs/__init__.py
from nautobot.core.celery import register_jobs

from nautobot_route_tracking.jobs.collect_routes import CollectRoutesJob
from nautobot_route_tracking.jobs.purge_old_data import PurgeOldDataJob

jobs = [CollectRoutesJob, PurgeOldDataJob]

register_jobs(*jobs)
```

This file is executed at startup. Without `register_jobs()`, jobs do not appear in the Nautobot UI even if they are importable.

### Complete `__init__.py` Example

```python
"""Nautobot Route Tracking Plugin."""

from importlib.metadata import metadata

from nautobot.apps import NautobotAppConfig

__version__ = metadata("nautobot-route-tracking")["Version"]

class NautobotRouteTrackingConfig(NautobotAppConfig):
    """Nautobot App Config for Route Tracking.

    See: https://docs.nautobot.com/projects/core/en/stable/development/apps/api/nautobot-app-config/
    """

    name = "nautobot_route_tracking"
    verbose_name = "Route Tracking"
    version = __version__
    author = "Thomas"
    author_email = "thomas@networktocode.com"
    description = "Track IP routing tables from network devices"
    base_url = "route-tracking"              # kebab-case, not snake_case
    required_settings = []                   # E.g.: ["NAUTOBOT_ROUTE_TRACKING_SECRET"]
    min_version = "3.0.6"
    max_version = "3.99"
    default_settings = {
        "retention_days": 90,
        "purge_enabled": True,
        "nornir_workers": 50,
        "device_timeout": 30,
    }

    def ready(self) -> None:
        """Hook called when the Django app is ready."""
        super().ready()
        from nautobot_route_tracking.signals import register_signals
        register_signals(sender=self.__class__)
        self._fix_job_grouping()

    @staticmethod
    def _fix_job_grouping() -> None:
        """Fix job grouping at each startup."""
        from django.db import OperationalError, ProgrammingError
        try:
            from nautobot.extras.models import Job
            Job.objects.filter(
                module_name__startswith="nautobot_route_tracking.jobs"
            ).update(grouping="Route Tracking")
        except (OperationalError, ProgrammingError):
            pass

config = NautobotRouteTrackingConfig  # Required variable -- Nautobot looks for it
```

**Critical point**: The `config` variable at the bottom of the file is **required**. Nautobot imports it automatically to register the plugin.

---

## 3. `pyproject.toml`

### Complete `[tool.poetry]` Section

```toml
[tool.poetry]
name = "nautobot-route-tracking"            # kebab-case -- PyPI name
version = "1.0.0"                           # semver
description = "Nautobot plugin for tracking IP routing tables from network devices"
authors = ["Thomas <thomas@networktocode.com>"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
readme = "README.md"
homepage = "https://github.com/networktocode/nautobot-route-tracking"
repository = "https://github.com/networktocode/nautobot-route-tracking"
documentation = "https://docs.nautobot.com/projects/route-tracking/"
keywords = ["nautobot", "nautobot-plugin", "routing", "bgp", "network-automation"]
classifiers = [
    "Development Status :: 4 - Beta",
    "Environment :: Plugins",
    "Framework :: Django",
    "Intended Audience :: System Administrators",
    "License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License",
    "Operating System :: OS Independent",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
    "Topic :: System :: Networking",
]
packages = [{ include = "nautobot_route_tracking" }]  # snake_case -- source directory
```

### Required Dependencies

```toml
[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = ">=3.10,<3.14"
nautobot = "^3.0.6"                         # Base framework
nornir = "^3.4.0"                           # Parallel orchestration
nornir-nautobot = "^4.0.0"                  # Nornir/Nautobot ORM integration
nautobot-plugin-nornir = "^3.0.0"           # ORM Inventory + Credentials
nornir-napalm = "^0.5.0"                    # NAPALM driver for Nornir
nornir-netmiko = "^1.0.0"                   # Netmiko driver for Nornir
napalm = "^5.0.0"                           # Multi-vendor abstraction
netmiko = "^4.3.0"                          # Multi-vendor SSH
```

### Dev Dependencies

```toml
[tool.poetry.group.dev.dependencies]
pytest = "^8.0.0"
pytest-cov = "^4.1.0"
pytest-django = "^4.8.0"
factory-boy = "^3.3.0"                      # Test data generation
coverage = "^7.4.0"
ruff = "^0.2.0"                             # Linter + formatter (replaces black + flake8)
pylint = "^3.0.0"
pylint-django = "^2.5.0"
pre-commit = "^3.6.0"
```

### `[build-system]`

```toml
[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core>=1.0.0"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
```

**Note**: There is no explicit entry point to declare for Nautobot plugins. Nautobot detects plugins via `PLUGINS` in `nautobot_config.py`, not via `entry_points`. The discovery mechanism is purely configuration-based.

---

## 4. Pytest Configuration for Nautobot

### `[tool.pytest.ini_options]` Section

```toml
[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
python_files = "test_*.py"
python_classes = "Test*"
python_functions = "test_*"
addopts = "-v --tb=short"
DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE = "tests.test_settings"
```

### `tests/test_settings.py`

This file is **critical** and contains several pitfalls specific to Nautobot 3.x:

```python
"""Django settings for nautobot_route_tracking plugin tests."""

from nautobot.core.settings import *  # noqa: F401, F403 -- import base Nautobot settings
from nautobot.core.settings_funcs import parse_redis_connection

# Secret key for tests (do not use in production)
SECRET_KEY = "test-secret-key-for-testing-only-not-for-production"

# In-memory database for tests
DATABASES = {
    "default": {
        "ENGINE": "django.db.backends.sqlite3",
        "NAME": ":memory:",
    }
}

# No Redis for tests
CACHES = {
    "default": {
        "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
    }
}

# CRITICAL: Both are needed
# PLUGINS: used by nautobot-server (CI migrations)
# INSTALLED_APPS.append(): required by pytest-django (django.setup() does not process PLUGINS)
PLUGINS = ["nautobot_route_tracking"]
INSTALLED_APPS.append("nautobot_route_tracking")  # noqa: F405

# Plugin configuration for tests
PLUGINS_CONFIG = {
    "nautobot_route_tracking": {
        "retention_days": 30,
        "purge_enabled": False,
        "nornir_workers": 2,
        "device_timeout": 5,
    }
}
```

**Critical pitfalls**:

1. `PLUGINS` alone is not enough with pytest-django -- also add to `INSTALLED_APPS`
2. `INSTALLED_APPS` is a list defined in the base Nautobot settings imported via `*`
3. In CI, use `nautobot-server makemigrations` (not `django-admin`) because `nautobot-server` processes `PLUGINS`

### CI Command for Migrations

```yaml
# Correct: nautobot-server processes PLUGINS
- name: Run migrations
  run: |
    poetry run nautobot-server init
    echo 'PLUGINS = ["nautobot_route_tracking"]' >> ~/.nautobot/nautobot_config.py
    poetry run nautobot-server makemigrations nautobot_route_tracking
    poetry run nautobot-server migrate

# Incorrect: django-admin does not process PLUGINS
- name: Run migrations
  env:
    DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: tests.test_settings
  run: poetry run django-admin makemigrations nautobot_route_tracking
```

---

## 5. Ruff Configuration

### `[tool.ruff]` Section

```toml
[tool.ruff]
line-length = 120
target-version = "py310"
extend-exclude = ["migrations"]             # Do not lint auto-generated migrations

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = [
    "E",     # pycodestyle errors
    "W",     # pycodestyle warnings
    "F",     # Pyflakes
    "I",     # isort (import sorting)
    "N",     # pep8-naming
    "D",     # pydocstring
    "UP",    # pyupgrade (Python syntax modernization)
    "B",     # flake8-bugbear
    "C4",    # flake8-comprehensions
    "DJ",    # flake8-django
    "SIM",   # flake8-simplify
    "RUF",   # Ruff-specific rules
]
ignore = [
    "D100",   # Missing docstring in public module
    "D104",   # Missing docstring in public package
    "D106",   # Missing docstring in public nested class
    "D203",   # 1 blank line required before class docstring (conflicts with D211)
    "D213",   # Multi-line summary at second line (conflicts with D212)
    "D401",   # Imperative mood (too strict)
    "D406",   # Section name should end with newline
    "D407",   # Missing dashed underline after section
    "D413",   # Missing blank line after last section
    "RUF012", # Mutable class attributes (standard Django Meta/admin patterns)
    "SIM102", # Nested if statements (sometimes more readable)
]

[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
"tests/*" = ["D", "S101"]                  # No docstrings required + assert OK in tests
"**/migrations/*" = ["D", "E501", "I"]    # Auto-generated migrations: ignore everything

[tool.ruff.lint.isort]
known-first-party = ["nautobot_route_tracking"]
known-third-party = ["nautobot"]
```

### Important `.gitignore` Patterns

```gitignore
# Python
__pycache__/
*.py[codz]
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/
.eggs/

# Tests
htmlcov/
.coverage
.coverage.*
.pytest_cache/
coverage.xml

# Django
*.log
local_settings.py
db.sqlite3

# Environments
.env
.envrc
.venv
venv/

# Poetry
# poetry.lock -- usually committed for reproducibility
# poetry.toml

# Celery
celerybeat-schedule
celerybeat.pid

# Tools
.ruff_cache/
.mypy_cache/
.tox/
/site                  # mkdocs build

# Editors
.idea/
.vscode/
```

---

## 6. REST API Registration

### `api/__init__.py`

Required empty file so Python recognizes the directory as a package:

```python
# nautobot_route_tracking/api/__init__.py
```

### `api/urls.py`

```python
"""API URL configuration for the nautobot_route_tracking plugin."""

from nautobot.apps.api import OrderedDefaultRouter

from nautobot_route_tracking.api.views import (
    RouteEntryViewSet,
    RoutingTableViewSet,
)

router = OrderedDefaultRouter()
router.register("route-entries", RouteEntryViewSet)
router.register("routing-tables", RoutingTableViewSet)

urlpatterns = router.urls
```

**Key points**:

- Use `OrderedDefaultRouter` from `nautobot.apps.api` (not `DefaultRouter` from DRF)
- Route slugs are in **kebab-case** (e.g. `"route-entries"`)
- Nautobot automatically mounts these URLs under `/api/plugins/<base_url>/`

### `api/views.py`

```python
from nautobot.apps.api import NautobotModelViewSet

from nautobot_route_tracking.api.serializers import RouteEntrySerializer
from nautobot_route_tracking.filters import RouteEntryFilterSet
from nautobot_route_tracking.models import RouteEntry

class RouteEntryViewSet(NautobotModelViewSet):
    """API ViewSet for RouteEntry."""

    queryset = RouteEntry.objects.select_related(
        "device",
        "device__location",
        "interface",
    ).prefetch_related("tags")
    serializer_class = RouteEntrySerializer
    filterset_class = RouteEntryFilterSet
```

### `api/serializers.py`

```python
from nautobot.apps.api import NautobotModelSerializer

from nautobot_route_tracking.models import RouteEntry

class RouteEntrySerializer(NautobotModelSerializer):
    """Serializer for RouteEntry."""

    class Meta:
        model = RouteEntry
        fields = [
            "id",
            "url",
            "display",
            "device",
            "prefix",
            "next_hop",
            "protocol",
            "first_seen",
            "last_seen",
            "tags",
            "created",
            "last_updated",
        ]
        read_only_fields = ["first_seen", "created", "last_updated"]
```

### `urls.py` (UI)

```python
"""UI URL configuration for the nautobot_route_tracking plugin."""

from django.urls import path
from nautobot.apps.urls import NautobotUIViewSetRouter

from nautobot_route_tracking.views import (
    RouteEntryUIViewSet,
    RoutingDashboardView,
)

app_name = "nautobot_route_tracking"

router = NautobotUIViewSetRouter()
router.register("route-entries", RouteEntryUIViewSet)

urlpatterns = [
    path("dashboard/", RoutingDashboardView.as_view(), name="dashboard"),
]

urlpatterns += router.urls
```

**Key points**:

- `app_name` is required for URL namespacing (`plugins:nautobot_route_tracking:...`)
- Use `NautobotUIViewSetRouter` from `nautobot.apps.urls`
- Nautobot mounts UI URLs under `/plugins/<base_url>/`

---

## 7. Navigation

```python
# nautobot_route_tracking/navigation.py
from nautobot.apps.ui import (
    NavMenuAddButton,
    NavMenuGroup,
    NavMenuItem,
    NavMenuTab,
)

menu_items = (
    NavMenuTab(
        name="Route Tracking",
        weight=500,
        groups=(
            NavMenuGroup(
                name="Routes",
                weight=50,
                items=(
                    NavMenuItem(
                        link="plugins:nautobot_route_tracking:routeentry_list",
                        name="Route Entries",
                        permissions=["nautobot_route_tracking.view_routeentry"],
                        buttons=(
                            NavMenuAddButton(
                                link="plugins:nautobot_route_tracking:routeentry_add",
                                permissions=["nautobot_route_tracking.add_routeentry"],
                            ),
                        ),
                        weight=100,
                    ),
                ),
            ),
        ),
    ),
)
```

**Link naming pattern**: `"plugins:<app_name>:<model_lower>_list"` and `"plugins:<app_name>:<model_lower>_add"` (automatically generated by `NautobotUIViewSetRouter`).

---

## 8. Coverage

### `[tool.coverage.run]` Section

```toml
[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["nautobot_route_tracking"]
branch = true
omit = [
    "*/migrations/*",
    "*/tests/*",
]

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "def __repr__",
    "raise AssertionError",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
    "if __name__ == .__main__.:",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
]
fail_under = 80                             # NTC standard: 80% minimum
```

---

## 9. Nautobot 3.x vs 2.x Differences

### Import Table

| Component | Nautobot 2.x | Nautobot 3.x |
| --------- | ------------ | ------------ |
| App Config | `from nautobot.extras.plugins import PluginConfig` | `from nautobot.apps import NautobotAppConfig` |
| Base Models | `from nautobot.core.models.generics import PrimaryModel` | `from nautobot.apps.models import PrimaryModel` |
| FilterSets | `from nautobot.extras.filters import NautobotFilterSet` | `from nautobot.apps.filters import NautobotFilterSet` |
| Filter Helpers | `from nautobot.utilities.filters import NaturalKeyOrPKMultipleChoiceFilter` | `from nautobot.apps.filters import NaturalKeyOrPKMultipleChoiceFilter` |
| Serializers | `from nautobot.extras.api.serializers import NautobotModelSerializer` | `from nautobot.apps.api import NautobotModelSerializer` |
| API ViewSets | `from nautobot.core.api.views import NautobotModelViewSet` | `from nautobot.apps.api import NautobotModelViewSet` |
| API Router | `from rest_framework.routers import DefaultRouter` | `from nautobot.apps.api import OrderedDefaultRouter` |
| UI ViewSets | `from nautobot.core.views.generic import ObjectListView` (custom) | `from nautobot.apps.views import NautobotUIViewSet` |
| UI Router | (manual) | `from nautobot.apps.urls import NautobotUIViewSetRouter` |
| Tables | `from nautobot.core.tables import BaseTable, ButtonsColumn` | `from nautobot.apps.tables import BaseTable, ButtonsColumn, ToggleColumn` |
| Navigation | `from nautobot.extras.plugins import PluginMenuItem` | `from nautobot.apps.ui import NavMenuTab, NavMenuGroup, NavMenuItem` |
| TemplateExtension | `from nautobot.extras.plugins import PluginTemplateExtension` | `from nautobot.apps.ui import TemplateExtension` |
| Jobs (classes) | `from nautobot.extras.jobs import Job, ObjectVar` | `from nautobot.apps.jobs import Job, ObjectVar, BooleanVar` |
| Jobs (register) | Not required (auto) | `from nautobot.core.celery import register_jobs` |
| Forms | `from nautobot.utilities.forms import BootstrapMixin` | `from nautobot.apps.forms import NautobotModelForm` |
| Pagination | `from nautobot.core.paginator import EnhancedPaginator` | `from nautobot.core.views.paginator import EnhancedPaginator, get_paginate_count` |
| SearchFilter | N/A | `from nautobot.apps.filters import SearchFilter` |

### Major Changes in 3.x

**1. `register_jobs()` is required**

In Nautobot 3.x, jobs are **no longer** auto-registered. `register_jobs(*jobs)` must be called explicitly in `jobs/__init__.py`.

**2. `NautobotUIViewSet` replaces generic views**

In 3.x, instead of manually composing `ObjectListView`, `ObjectEditView`, etc., you inherit from `NautobotUIViewSet` which automatically handles list/detail/add/edit/delete/bulk_destroy/bulk_edit.

**3. Removal of `NestedSerializer`**

In 3.x, `NestedXxxSerializer` classes are removed. FK relationships in the API directly use the base serializer with `?depth=N`.

**4. Removal of `CSVForm` and `to_csv`**

CSV export now goes through the REST API (no dedicated forms).

### 5. FilterSet: multi-value FK fields by default

In 3.x, FK filters automatically generate `MultipleChoiceFilter`. For tests, pass FK values as a **list**:

```python
# Correct Nautobot 3.x
filterset = RouteEntryFilterSet({"device": [str(device.pk)]})

# Incorrect (2.x style)
filterset = RouteEntryFilterSet({"device": device.pk})
```

### 6. Standard template rendering required

```django
{# Nautobot standard template #}
{% render_table table "inc/table.html" %}
{% include 'inc/paginator.html' with paginator=table.paginator page=table.page %}

{# Generic django-tables2 template #}
{% render_table table "django_tables2/bootstrap5.html" %}
```

**7. `ScriptVariable`: attributes in `field_attrs`**

```python
# Nautobot 3.x
assert job.retention_days.field_attrs["initial"] == 90

# Nautobot 2.x style
assert job.retention_days.default == 90
```

**8. `NautobotAppConfig` replaces `PluginConfig`**

```python
# Nautobot 3.x
from nautobot.apps import NautobotAppConfig

class MyConfig(NautobotAppConfig):
    pass

# Nautobot 1.x/2.x
from nautobot.extras.plugins import PluginConfig

class MyConfig(PluginConfig):
    pass
```

---

## 10. Summary: `nautobot_netdb_tracking` Structure as Reference

The `nautobot_netdb_tracking` plugin is the main reference proven in production. Here is its complete structure:

```text
nautobot_netdb_tracking/                   # Git repo
â”śâ”€â”€ .gitignore
â”śâ”€â”€ .ruff_cache/
â”śâ”€â”€ LICENSE
â”śâ”€â”€ pyproject.toml
â”śâ”€â”€ docs/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ cable_autocreate_guide.md
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ job_topology.md
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ platform_configuration.md
â”‚
â”śâ”€â”€ nautobot_netdb_tracking/               # Python package
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py                        # NautobotNetDBTrackingConfig
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ models.py                          # MACAddressHistory, ARPEntry, TopologyConnection
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ filters.py                         # NautobotFilterSet for each model
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ forms.py                           # UI Forms + Filter Forms
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ tables.py                          # BaseTable for each model
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ views.py                           # NautobotUIViewSet + custom views
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ urls.py                            # UI routing (NautobotUIViewSetRouter + path())
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ navigation.py                      # NavMenuTab/Group/Item
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ signals.py                         # post_migrate: enable jobs + fix grouping
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ template_content.py                # TemplateExtension: Device + Interface tabs
â”‚   â”‚
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ api/
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ serializers.py                 # NautobotModelSerializer
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ views.py                       # NautobotModelViewSet
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ urls.py                        # OrderedDefaultRouter
â”‚   â”‚
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ jobs/
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py                    # register_jobs()
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ _base.py                       # BaseCollectionJob (abstract class)
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ collect_mac_arp.py
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ collect_topology.py
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ purge_old_data.py
â”‚   â”‚
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ migrations/
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ 0001_initial.py
â”‚   â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ 0002_rename_constraints.py
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ 0003_add_first_seen_indexes.py
â”‚   â”‚
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ static/
â”‚   â”‚   â””â”€â”€ nautobot_netdb_tracking/
â”‚   â”‚       â”śâ”€â”€ css/netdb.css
â”‚   â”‚       â””â”€â”€ js/netdb.js
â”‚   â”‚
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ templates/
â”‚       â””â”€â”€ nautobot_netdb_tracking/
â”‚           â””â”€â”€ inc/
â”‚               â””â”€â”€ interface_netdb_panel.html
â”‚
â””â”€â”€ tests/
    â””â”€â”€ __init__.py
```

### Key Patterns Observed in `nautobot_netdb_tracking`

**`__init__.py`**:

- `__version__` read from installed package metadata (`importlib.metadata`)
- `ready()` calls `super().ready()` then signals then `_fix_job_grouping()`
- `_fix_job_grouping()` is `@staticmethod` with try/except `(OperationalError, ProgrammingError)`
- `config = NautobotNetDBTrackingConfig` on the last line (required)

**`api/urls.py`**:

- `OrderedDefaultRouter` from `nautobot.apps.api`
- Slugs in kebab-case: `"mac-address-history"`, `"arp-entries"`, `"topology-connections"`

**`urls.py` (UI)**:

- `NautobotUIViewSetRouter` from `nautobot.apps.urls`
- `app_name = "nautobot_netdb_tracking"` for namespacing
- Custom views mounted with `path()` (dashboard, lookup, specific tabs)
- `urlpatterns += router.urls` at the end

**`jobs/__init__.py`**:

- Import of `register_jobs` from `nautobot.core.celery`
- List `jobs = [...]` then `register_jobs(*jobs)`

**`signals.py`**:

- `post_migrate.connect(handler, sender=sender)` with `sender=self.__class__` (AppConfig)
- Scoping to the AppConfig avoids re-triggering for other app migrations
- Utility functions (`get_retention_days`, `is_purge_enabled`) read `settings.PLUGINS_CONFIG`

**`navigation.py`**:

- `NavMenuTab` > `NavMenuGroup` > `NavMenuItem`
- Link format: `"plugins:nautobot_netdb_tracking:dashboard"`, `"plugins:nautobot_netdb_tracking:topologyconnection_list"`
- `NavMenuAddButton` for the "+" button on list views

**`template_content.py`**:

- `TemplateExtension` from `nautobot.apps.ui`
- `model = "dcim.device"` (format `app_label.ModelName`)
- `detail_tabs()` returns a list of dicts with `"title"` and `"url"`
- `right_page()` returns `self.render("template.html", extra_context={...})`
- Module-level global variable `template_extensions = [...]`
